query:
SELECT 
  customerName,
  customerExternalId,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
GROUP BY customerName, customerExternalId
ORDER BY customerName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  customerName,
  customerExternalId,
  COUNT(*) as count
